info.title: StarFoundry API
info.description:
# API

The API provides an interface for external tools. It is free to use, I only ask that you don't abuse it, otherwise I will have to do counter messures.

**Base URL**

`https://api.industry.starfoundry.space`

## API Versioning

The API is versioned by an path param. `https://api.industry.starfoundry.space/v{version}`. You can omitt the version, then the default version will be used.

| Version | Status | Default |
|---------|--------|---------|
| v1      | Active | Yes     |

## User-Agent

Please provide a [user agent](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9110.html#section-10.1.5)

User Agent Example

`User-Agent: SomeBot ($url, $versionNumber)`

## Content Type

The API always answers with `Content-Type: application/json`, other content types will be rejected.

## Contact

- Discord: https://discord.gg/qShbyn4r9N
- GitHub: https://github.com/ChiefOmnicron/starfoundry
- Ingame: mail to 'Eistonen Kodan Sasen'

get.description:
Fetches a list of projects that match the given filter

## Security
- authenticated
- project:read

200.description: List of projects the character has access to

post.description:
Creates a new project and returns it's id

## Security
- authenticated

415.description: wrong media type, must be application/json

code.description:
code that was used to create the appraisal, will be null if it was for compression or reprocessing
will be 10 characters long, [a-zA-z0-9]

created_at.description: timestamp when it was created in milliseconds

invalid.description: includes all fields that could not be parsed

items.description: all parsed items with their pricing information

market_id.description: market that was used to create the appraisal

price_modifier.description: the price modifier is applied on the return data

appraisal.description: raw entry of the items that should be appraised

comment.description: comment for the appraisal, per default empty

market_id.description: market that should be used, jita is the default

oneOf.description:
whether or not the apprisal should be stored, persist per default
can either 'Persist' or 'NonPersist'

price_modifier.description: modifier for the price, default is 100%

low_data.description: if there are not enough items on the market to cover the requested amount

CostEstimateProduct.description: information about a product being built

additional_products.description:
products that either shouldn't be build or cannot be build, but still
belong to the project

products.description: products that should be build in the project

example.name: My Project Name
example.orderer: its for somebody I used to know

ProjectStatus.description:
Different states of the project

A newly created project will always be in the status `Preparing`.
When the projects switches into `InProgress` the job detection gets active
for that project.
Afterwards the project is either `Done` or `Closed`. Job detection then gets
deaktivated again.
